name: @prune/prefix-warm
description: F12-adjacent — TTL-aware prompt-cache prefix warming for cross-session reuse. Deterministic cache arithmetic over a stable prefix (system + tool defs + pinned context): given the last-use time and the provider cache TTL, decide whether the prefix is still warm, when it expires, whether a keep-alive is worth sending, and the read-discount savings of a hit vs a cold prefix. Caller supplies tokens, TTL, and discount — never fabricated. No regex, no model call.
